name: Auto Deafen for Eclipse
description: Auto Deafen with an in-level configuration popup opened by a native Geode Shift keybind. Records a readable Discord toggle-deafen key and normalizes level progress correctly, presses it at the chosen percentage, then again on death, restart, completion, or exit.

enabled.name: Auto Deafen
enabled.description: Enable automatic deafen while playing a level.

deafen-percent.name: Deafen at (%)
deafen-percent.description: Press your chosen Discord Toggle Deafen key when progress reaches this percentage.

open-menu-keybind.name: Open Auto Deafen Menu
open-menu-keybind.description: Open the Auto Deafen popup while you are inside a level. Shift works with either left or right Shift key.
